deleteAccount.deleted: Your account has been successfully deleted
notification.title: Notification
privacy.textCollection: ForeXchange collects only the personal data necessary for remittance processing: your email address, full name, and recipient IBAN details. No sensitive financial credentials are stored beyond what is required for transaction compliance.
privacy.textEncryption: Passwords are hashed using Argon2id and Bcrypt via the pwdlib library — never stored in plain text. All data is transmitted over TLS and stored in a PostgreSQL database with schema-level validation. Security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection) are enforced on every response.
privacy.textAccess: ForeXchange implements role-based access control (RBAC) with two roles: **Customer** and **Auditor**. Sensitive fields such as recipient IBAN and compliance details are visible only to authorised Auditor users. Every data access is authenticated via JWT tokens.
privacy.textDeletion: You may request complete deletion of your account and associated data at any time via the Settings page. Once deleted, no residual copies of your personal data are retained. This aligns with the principle of data minimisation and your right to be forgotten.
privacy.textSovereignty: ForeXchange respects the inherent rights of individuals and communities over their data. The system is designed to give you visibility into what data is collected, how it is used, and the ability to withdraw consent at any time. These protections follow the principles of Te Mana Raraunga (Māori Data Sovereignty Network) and the New Zealand Privacy Act 2020.
privacy.textContact: For questions about this policy or to exercise your data rights, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or contact the project maintainer.
